violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Inspector observed raw eggs on same shelf as ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the self-service cooler. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
Cases of raw chicken were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The deli display case located at the front counter area was not in good repair. Inspector observed ice accumulation at the condenser. PIC stated service has been scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine cover have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
